revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:坊田古墳群]][[zh:坊田古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|35.06768333|N|135.51513056|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}
{{Location map|Japan Kyoto|lat_deg=35|lat_min=4|lat_sec=3.66|lon_deg=135|lon_min=30|lon_sec=54.47|label=Boden Kofun Group|position=top|width=220|mark=Red pog.svg|marksize=10|caption={{Center|Location of Boden Kofun Group|qq=}}|qq=}} {{GeoGroup|qq=}} '''Boden Kofun Group''' (坊田古墳群) is a {{ill|Kofun group|ja|古墳群|1=Kofun cluster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun group|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun cluster|qq=}} located in {{ill|Nantan, Kyoto|en|Nantan, Kyoto|qid=Q170421|lt=Nantan, Kyoto|1=Nantan, Kyoto}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Five of the tombs have been designated as a Kyoto Prefectural Historic Site. == Overview == The Boden Kofun Group is a cluster of Kofuns located at the western foothills near the urban area of {{ill|Yagi, Kyoto|ja|八木町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagi, Kyoto|1=Yagicho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11391390}}, central Kyoto Prefecture. The group consists of '''eight tombs''', including '''seven {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|lt=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}''' (円墳) and '''one {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|lt=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}''' (方墳) (some '''{{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|lt=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}''' may have originally been square).<ref name="丹波八木の歴史">*Illustrated History of Tanba Yagi, Vol. 1: Archaeology, Geography, and Cultural Properties* (八木町史編集委員会, Nantan City, 2012), pp. 56-67.</ref> The burial chambers are all of the {{ill|Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-shiki sekishitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (horizontal stone chamber) type, with an '''excavation survey conducted only on Tomb No. 5'''.{{Sfn|Kyoto Cultural Properties Vol. 5|1987|pp=54-55|qq=}}<ref name="丹波八木の歴史"/> The tumuli are believed to have been built between the '''late 6th century and early 7th century''' during the late {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|qid=Q459939|lt=Kofun period|1=Kofun period}}.<ref name="丹波八木の歴史"/> In the '''Southern Tanba region (Mouth of Tanba)''', tumuli with stone chambers '''exceeding 10 meters in length''' are rare,{{Sfn|Kyoto Prefectural Archaeological Report No. 16|1985|pp=45-49|qq=}} making this kofun group an important example of '''late-period kofun clusters''' in the region.{{Sfn|Kyoto Cultural Properties Vol. 5|1987|pp=54-55|qq=}} Additionally, the nearby '''Yagishima archaeological site''', which is believed to have housed an influential local clan residence, suggests a close relationship with the Boden Kofun Group.<ref name="丹波八木の歴史"/> In '''1987 (Shōwa 62)''', the '''five tumuli numbered 1 to 5''' were designated as a '''Kyoto Prefectural Historic Site'''.<ref name="南丹市"/> == Excavation History == * '''1969 (Shōwa 44):''' Confirmation of Tombs 1-4. * '''1978 (Shōwa 53):''' Measurement survey of Tombs 1-4 and excavation of Tomb 5 (Kyoto Prefectural Board of Education, preliminary report released in 1979). * '''April 15, 1987 (Shōwa 62):''' Designation as a Kyoto Prefectural Historic Site.<ref name="南丹市"/> == Tomb List == [[File:Boden Kofun Group-1.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Tomb No. 1|qq=}}]] [[File:Boden Kofun Group-5.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Tomb No. 5|qq=}}]] ; '''Tomb No. 1''' :* Type: '''{{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|lt=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (方墳)''' :* Size: 18m per side, 4m height{{Sfn|Kyoto Cultural Properties Vol. 5|1987|pp=54-55|qq=}} :* Burial Chamber: '''Double-entrance {{ill|Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (両袖式横穴式石室)'''{{Sfn|Kyoto Cultural Properties Vol. 5|1987|pp=54-55|qq=}} : '''Stone Chamber Dimensions:''' :: *Main chamber*: 5.8m length × 2.3m width × 2.0m height :: *Entrance passage*: 2.0m length × 1.3m width × 0.7m height{{Sfn|Kyoto Cultural Properties Vol. 5|1987|pp=54-55|qq=}} ; '''Tomb No. 2''' :* Type: '''{{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|lt=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (円墳) (possibly square)'''<ref name="丹波八木の歴史"/> :* Size: 8m diameter, 2m height{{Sfn|Kyoto Cultural Properties Vol. 5|1987|pp=54-55|qq=}} :* Burial Chamber: '''{{ill|Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}}'''{{Sfn|Kyoto Cultural Properties Vol. 5|1987|pp=54-55|qq=}} : '''Stone Chamber Condition:''' :: Only ceiling stones are visible, and further details remain unknown.{{Sfn|Kyoto Cultural Properties Vol. 5|1987|pp=54-55|qq=}} ; '''Tomb No. 3''' :* Type: '''{{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|lt=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (円墳) (possibly square)'''<ref name="丹波八木の歴史"/> :* Size: 15m diameter, 4m height{{Sfn|Kyoto Cultural Properties Vol. 5|1987|pp=54-55|qq=}} :* Burial Chamber: '''Single-entrance {{ill|Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (片袖式横穴式石室)'''{{Sfn|Kyoto Cultural Properties Vol. 5|1987|pp=54-55|qq=}} : '''Stone Chamber Dimensions:''' :: *Main chamber*: 3.9m length × 1.7m width × 1.8m height :: *Entrance passage*: 3.8m length × 1.1m width × 1.2m height{{Sfn|Kyoto Cultural Properties Vol. 5|1987|pp=54-55|qq=}} ; '''Tomb No. 4''' :* Type: '''{{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|lt=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (円墳)''' :* Size: 10m diameter, 2m height{{Sfn|Kyoto Cultural Properties Vol. 5|1987|pp=54-55|qq=}} :* Burial Chamber: '''{{ill|Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}}'''{{Sfn|Kyoto Cultural Properties Vol. 5|1987|pp=54-55|qq=}} : '''Stone Chamber Condition:''' :: The chamber is partially collapsed, but remaining dimensions are at least: :: 3.6m length × 1.2m width × 1.2m height{{Sfn|Kyoto Cultural Properties Vol. 5|1987|pp=54-55|qq=}} ; '''Tomb No. 5''' :* Type: '''{{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|lt=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (円墳)''' :* Size: 16m diameter, 4.5m height{{Sfn|Kyoto Cultural Properties Vol. 5|1987|pp=54-55|qq=}} :* Burial Chamber: '''Double-entrance {{ill|Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}}'''{{Sfn|Kyoto Cultural Properties Vol. 5|1987|pp=54-55|qq=}} : '''Location:''' Inside the grounds of '''Kyoto Prefectural Tanba Special Needs School'''. <gallery> File:Boden Kofun Group-2.jpg|2号墳 File:Boden Kofun Group-3-1.jpg|3号墳 File:Boden Kofun Group-3-2.jpg|3号墳 石室内部 File:Boden Kofun Group-3, 3D-1.jpg|3号墳 石室俯瞰図 File:Boden Kofun Group-3, 3D-2.jpg|3号墳 石室展開図 File:Boden Kofun Group-4.jpg|4号墳 </gallery> == Cultural Properties == === Kyoto Prefectural Designated Cultural Properties === * '''Historic Site''' ** ''' Boden Kofun Group - Designated on April 15, 1987.<ref>[http://spogaku.pref.kyoto.lg.jp/asset/1655.html Boden Kofun Group] (Kyoto Prefectural Lifelong Learning & Sports Information).</ref><ref name="南丹市">[http://www.be.city.nantan.kyoto.jp/%E6%96%87%E5%8C%96%E8%B2%A1%E4%B8%80%E8%A6%A7.htm Cultural Properties List] (Nantan City Board of Education).</ref> ''' == References == {{reflist|qq=}} == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Boden Kofun Group|qq=}} {{Coord|35|4|3.66|N|135|30|54.47|E|region:JP-26_type:landmark|display=title|name=Boden Kofun Group|qq=}} https://shinto.miraheze.org/wiki/File:Boden_Kofun_Group-3,_3D-P.jpg
{{translated page|ja|坊田古墳群|version=103110212|comment=Imported full ja history}}
